Time of flight spectrometer of Institute
of Physics and Power Engineering, Obninsk
2.5 nsec pulsed neutrons were generated by
Klystron Neutron Generator KG-0.3 of IPPE .
Ti-T air cooled target. Deuterons of 250 keV.

-In the case of Pb-208(N,N'G) experiment 2.2 m.

and 5 cm in length. For scattered neutrons.
NaI(Tl) crystal scintillator 10 cm in diameter
and 10 cm in length.For gammas detection.
Long counter for monitoring neutron yield from
for neutron generator pulse control as TOF monitor.
Neutron detector efficiency was determined by:
- Cf-252 ionization chamber, replaced the sample
via spectrum of prompt fission neutrons;
- measurement of n-p scattering c-s by means of
stilbene scintillator (1 cm diameter, 4 cm length),
in neutron energy range above 6 MeV;
- associated alpha particles method by silicon
surface barrier detector, at 14 MeV neutron energy.
calculation of incident neutron flux at sample position
-Data were corrected for multiple scattering  and
neutron flux attenuation by Monte-Carlo code SSE.
Systematic Error 6% have to be added to
statistical error to get total error .
